h52de73acgd3e7g4752g8750g49dc7fd66c83: Did I really leave it out in the open like this? I must be more careful, people will start to notice wildlife drained of blood.
hf76af9f5ge394g4392gb3f9g441f56b2db8c: *A dead boar, but it doesn't look like it's been touched by scavengers.*
h64e80241g7c94g4b29g94c8ge1e9462aad1c: *The carcass seems to be fresh - only a few hours dead. You notice two small puncture wounds in its neck.*
h5df0294bgc4c2g424fgb7f6gf3e9bacad046: *Looking closer, you can see the skin around its face is desiccated. It's been completely drained of blood.*
h68e01dc1g90e7g4753g8a52ga65e50c36713: *The boar seems to be fresh - only a few hours dead - but you can't find any sign of a wound.*
